bead.title: Add gRPC integration test for lifecycle transition (axon-686c066a follow-on)
bead.description:
Opus review of axon-686c066a found that while HTTP integration tests were added (crates/axon-server/tests/), the gRPC transport path for TransitionLifecycle has no integration test — only the HTTP and MCP paths are directly exercised. The gRPC service method delegates to handler.transition_lifecycle but this path is untested.

Required: Add at least one integration test that calls the gRPC TransitionLifecycle RPC directly (using a test gRPC client against a running axon-server), asserts that: (a) a valid transition succeeds and returns the updated entity, (b) an invalid transition (wrong state, missing required fields) returns gRPC Status INVALID_ARGUMENT, not INTERNAL.

Files to modify: crates/axon-server/tests/ (add grpc_lifecycle_test.rs or extend existing grpc_integration.rs if it exists). Use the tonic test client pattern already in use elsewhere in the test suite.
bead.acceptance: At least one gRPC integration test for TransitionLifecycle exists; test exercises the happy path (valid transition) and one error path (invalid state) via gRPC; test passes with cargo test --workspace; test is isolated and does not depend on external services
